summary: Iteration 3 browser pass against https://mission-control-v8.preview.emergentagent.com. 9 of 12 flows PASSED-IN-BROWSER, 1 PARTIAL, 1 FAILED, 1 NOT-TESTED. New RuntimeKeysPanel and AgentGatewayPanel now render and work (iteration 2 launch-blockers resolved). However, /app/team route still does NOT mount the TeamPanel data-testid for cz-1780200960 — the page renders the dashboard/overview instead of TeamPanel — so the Team/Members launch blocker is still open in browser. Agent Gateway tasks list is empty in the API (/api/agent-gateway/tasks returns {tasks:[]}) so the row-expansion + logs sub-test could not be exercised in browser (panel itself, 4 agent pills, MC-connected pill, and tasks-section frame all render correctly).

minor.issue: Returns {tasks: []} for cz-1780200960 in workspace 338 even though the request claimed a pre-existing smoke-test task. Prevents in-browser verification of gateway-task-row-* + task-*-logs UI.

ui_bugs.issue: [data-testid='team-panel'] is NOT rendered. The page renders the Overview/Dashboard layout instead (Setup checklist / Mission Control supervises Baseline OS card). Reproducible across two separate browser sessions for cz-1780200960@example.com (workspace 338, admin). Iteration 2 claimed this was fixed but the fix has NOT landed in the deployed build, or middleware is redirecting /app/team back to /app for this user.

Two distinct tours fire on first session: (a) 'Welcome to Mission Control' modal dismissed via 'Skip setup' button, then (b) a 10-step coach-mark tour ('TOUR · 1 OF 10 This is your Executive Briefing') dismissed via 'Skip tour' link. Tour (b) re-appears after navigation and visually covers panel content until dismissed.
ui_bugs.priority: MEDIUM (test ergonomics — block test agents/customers if they don't know to dismiss twice)

integration_issues.issue: Panel + 4 pills + MC-connected all render; gateway-status-ok=present; gateway-status-unreachable absent. But Recent Tasks list says 'No tasks yet' and /api/agent-gateway/tasks=[], so gateway-task-row-* + task-*-logs sub-test could not be performed.

flow_results.FLOW-A_Homepage: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (GET / → 200, positioning copy visible after scroll, footer VisionOps + PropControl links present)
flow_results.FLOW-B_Login: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (label is now 'Username or email' — iteration 1 finding resolved; login as cz-1780200960 lands on /app)
flow_results.FLOW-C_DismissTour: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (Skip setup dismisses welcome modal; a separate 10-step tour needs 'Skip tour' link to be clicked)
flow_results.FLOW-D_Team_Invite: FAILED-IN-BROWSER ([data-testid='team-panel'] count=0 on /app/team. Page renders dashboard instead of TeamPanel. invite-email-input, invite-role-select, invite-submit-button all NOT present in DOM.)
flow_results.FLOW-E_AcceptInvite: NOT-TESTED (FLOW-D failed, no accept_url to consume)
flow_results.FLOW-F_RuntimeKeys_Mint: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (runtime-keys-panel=1, runtime-keys-mint-section=1, key-agent-select pre-populated with cz-codex, mint-key-button works, fresh-key-block + fresh-key-value 'mca_...' rendered, runtime-keys-existing-list shows 'cz-codex-key mca_4b92f795...'. Resolves iteration-1 launch-blocker.)
flow_results.FLOW-G_AgentGateway: PARTIAL-IN-BROWSER (agent-gateway-panel=1, agent-gateway-health-card=1, gateway-status-ok=1, gateway-status-unreachable=0, all 4 pills present claude/codex/opencode/hermes, gateway-mc-connected='connected', agent-gateway-tasks-section=1 — but 0 task rows because gateway DB returned []. Cannot exercise task-row-expand → logs.)
flow_results.FLOW-H_Billing: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (page loads, Stripe test-mode amber banner visible, credit pack copy rendered)
flow_results.FLOW-I_DemoCPA: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (briefing-headline = 'Tax season pressure is dropping. One reconciliation needs you.'; visible 'DEMO MODE / You are viewing CPA / Accounting Firm' amber banner with Exit Demo Mode button. Resolves iteration-1 FAILED finding.)
flow_results.FLOW-J_Logout_Relogin: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (logout → /login, re-login as cz-1780200960 returns to /app, 'Customer Zero' workspace text visible)
flow_results.FLOW-K_ForgotPassword: PASSED-IN-BROWSER ('If an account exists for that email, we've sent reset instructions.' rendered, no 429)
flow_results.FLOW-L_FlightDeck: PASSED-IN-BROWSER ('Installer build pending' / pending banner present, macOS/Windows/Linux cards present)

action_items: INVESTIGATE /app/team route for cz-1780200960@example.com — server is returning the Overview/Dashboard HTML instead of the TeamPanel route. Either (a) the new TeamPanel-bearing build was not actually deployed to the live URL (supervisor may still be running stale .next bundle), or (b) middleware/route group redirects /app/team to /app when onboarding is incomplete. Verify by hitting the page server-side and checking response body for 'team-panel' string. The iteration-2 promise 'TeamPanel did not show accept_url box (fixed)' cannot be verified in browser because the panel itself does not render.

SEED at least one task into /tmp/agent-gateway/tasks.db (or have one of the 4 agents POST a task through /api/agent-gateway/tasks) so the gateway-task-row-* / task-*-logs UI can be exercised end-to-end by automation. Right now /api/agent-gateway/tasks returns {tasks:[]}.

Consider a single 'Skip all onboarding' button — the welcome modal AND the 10-step coach tour both fire on first session and confuse first-run automation. Iteration-2 review note explicitly only mentioned 'Skip setup', missing the second 'Skip tour' link.

(Optional cosmetic) Add 'Demo mode' query-param support documentation visible in the UI — the Exit Demo Mode pill is good; consider showing a similar amber pill on /app/overview when ?demo=cpa is set even before scroll.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/team route appears decoupled from the deployed bundle: TeamPanel testids are absent from server-rendered HTML even though /app/src/components/panels/team-panel.tsx exists in repo. Check that the standalone .next/standalone/server.js was rebuilt after the team-panel changes (mtime of .next/standalone vs src/components/panels/team-panel.tsx).

Agent Gateway tasks endpoint returns empty list — verify AGENT_GATEWAY_URL + AGENT_GATEWAY_API_KEY resolve from MC server context AND that workspace_id 338 has authority over the gateway DB rows (may be a workspace-scoping filter eating the smoke task).

FirstRunTour 10-step coach-mark tour blocks panel testid reads after a soft client-side navigation — consider rendering it as a portal that does NOT intercept pointer events on the underlying DOM, or auto-dismiss when user navigates away from /app.

success_rate.backend: not tested (frontend-only run, but /api/agent-gateway/tasks probed → 200 empty)

seed_data_creation: Minted 1 runtime API key 'browser-pass-final' on agent cz-codex (visible as cz-codex-key mca_4b92f795... in runtime-keys-existing-list). No team invite created (FLOW-D blocked).
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) /app/team STILL does not render TeamPanel for cz-1780200960. Reproduced twice. Most likely the deployed standalone bundle was not actually rebuilt after the team-panel fix — confirm via `ls -la /app/.next/standalone/server.js` mtime vs `/app/src/components/panels/team-panel.tsx` mtime, OR `curl -s -b cookies https://mission-control-v8.preview.emergentagent.com/app/team | grep team-panel`. 2) Agent Gateway tasks DB is empty in the deployed env — seed a row before retest or the row-expand subtest will always be skip. 3) After login a SECOND tour fires on every navigation ('TOUR · 1 OF 10') — dismiss via 'Skip tour' text link in addition to 'Skip setup' button. 4) Iteration-3 'launch-readiness': RuntimeKeys ✅ Agent-Gateway-panel ✅ Team ❌. A stranger CANNOT complete the customer journey through the UI alone yet because they cannot invite teammates from /app/team.
rca of the issue: FLOW-D root-cause hypothesis: the /app/team Next.js route either (a) is not built into .next/standalone (build artifact stale despite iteration-2 supervisor fix), or (b) middleware in src/middleware.ts redirects /app/team → /app for workspaces where onboarding %<100. The body content returned for /app/team in two independent sessions is IDENTICAL to /app overview (Setup checklist + 'Mission Control supervises Baseline OS' panel), strongly suggesting a redirect/fallback rather than a 404. Verify with: `curl -s -b /tmp/cz.cookies 'https://mission-control-v8.preview.emergentagent.com/app/team' -o /tmp/team.html && grep -c 'team-panel\|TeamPanel' /tmp/team.html`. If zero, the page never reaches TeamPanel render. Mitigation: rebuild .next/standalone (yarn build) after confirming src/app/(app)/team/page.tsx is in the source tree, and restart supervisor.
